goal: PBT closure: lint determinism, AntiPattern validation, classifier branch reachability

summary.title: Close PBT followups: lint determinism + AntiPattern validation + classifier reachability
summary.what: Add four property-based tests in internal/engine/lint_property_test.go (build-tag !quick): lint determinism on rerun, lint Pass↔no-errors bidirectional invariant, AntiPattern validation rule across random what/why/severity, classifier reachability for all four canonical retrieval statuses.
summary.why: PR #68 declared three follow-up PBTs. Closing them keeps the project honest with its own design protocol (agent.md Step 3: every load-bearing invariant gets generative coverage).

decisions.chose: collect statuses across rapid iterations; assert each canonical value seen at least once
decisions.rationale: reachability is an existential claim — one hit per branch is enough; rapid drives the search

anti_patterns.what: PBT-named tests that run one fixed case
anti_patterns.why: Provides false confidence; readers assume rapid is exploring the space when it is not
